prompt: Create a cinematic vertical portrait of a gritty Japanese noir detective on a rain-slick rooftop in Tokyo at sunset. The subject is a rugged middle-aged Japanese man with wet swept-back black hair, stubble, a stern tired expression, visible neck and chest tattoos, standing three-quarter frontal and looking slightly down at the viewer with a tough, brooding attitude. He wears a dark pinstripe suit, black open-collar shirt, leather-like dark coat, belt, and loose trousers; one hand is in his pocket and the other holds a cigarette near his thigh. The environment is a dense urban Tokyo skyline with glowing windows, neon signs, and industrial rooftop details, all wet from rain with strong reflections on the floor. Include exactly 3 prominent signs: a large weathered rooftop billboard on the right reading 「東京探偵 事務所」, a vertical red neon hotel sign on the left reading 「ホテル ニュー東京」, and a smaller red sign in the mid-background reading 「ポンコ」. Use dramatic golden-orange sunset breaking through dark storm clouds as the main backlight, creating rim light around the character and high-contrast shadows on his face and suit. Style should be ultra-realistic cinematic photography, moody neo-noir crime drama, 35mm film look, shallow depth of field, wet textures, volumetric haze, rich amber highlights and deep black shadows, high detail skin texture, realistic fabric folds, no cartoon styling, no extra characters, no watermark.
promptEn: Create a cinematic vertical portrait of a gritty Japanese noir detective on a rain-slick rooftop in Tokyo at sunset. The subject is a rugged middle-aged Japanese man with wet swept-back black hair, stubble, a stern tired expression, visible neck and chest tattoos, standing three-quarter frontal and looking slightly down at the viewer with a tough, brooding attitude. He wears a dark pinstripe suit, black open-collar shirt, leather-like dark coat, belt, and loose trousers; one hand is in his pocket and the other holds a cigarette near his thigh. The environment is a dense urban Tokyo skyline with glowing windows, neon signs, and industrial rooftop details, all wet from rain with strong reflections on the floor. Include exactly 3 prominent signs: a large weathered rooftop billboard on the right reading 「東京探偵 事務所」, a vertical red neon hotel sign on the left reading 「ホテル ニュー東京」, and a smaller red sign in the mid-background reading 「ポンコ」. Use dramatic golden-orange sunset breaking through dark storm clouds as the main backlight, creating rim light around the character and high-contrast shadows on his face and suit. Style should be ultra-realistic cinematic photography, moody neo-noir crime drama, 35mm film look, shallow depth of field, wet textures, volumetric haze, rich amber highlights and deep black shadows, high detail skin texture, realistic fabric folds, no cartoon styling, no extra characters, no watermark.
promptZh: 创作一张电影感竖构图肖像，描绘一位硬派日本黑色电影风格侦探，场景位于雨后湿滑的东京屋顶，时间为日落时分。主体为 一位粗犷的中年日本男子，湿漉漉的后梳黑发，留着胡茬，表情严肃疲惫，颈部和胸部有明显的纹身，以四分之三正面角度站立，带着坚毅、沉思的神情微微俯视观众。他穿着 深色细条纹西装，黑色开领衬衫，仿皮深色大衣，系着腰带，穿着宽松的长裤；一只手插在口袋里，另一只手拿着香烟垂在大腿旁。环境是密集的东京城市天际线，点缀着发光的窗户、霓虹灯和工业风的屋顶细节，地面因雨水而湿润，反射出强烈的光影。画面中需包含 3 个醒目的标志：右侧是一个写有「東京探偵 事務所」的大型风化屋顶广告牌，左侧是一个写有「ホテル ニュー東京」的红色垂直霓虹灯酒店招牌，背景中部是一个写有「ポンコ」的小型红色招牌。使用 从乌云中穿透而出的戏剧性金橙色日落 作为主要背光，在角色轮廓处形成边缘光，并在他的脸部和西装上营造出高对比度的阴影。风格应为超写实电影摄影，带有忧郁的新黑色犯罪剧质感，35mm 胶片感，浅景深，湿润的纹理，体积雾，丰富的琥珀色高光和深邃的黑色阴影，高细节皮肤纹理，逼真的布料褶皱，禁止卡通风格，禁止额外角色，禁止水印。
